english: Compared to solar power, what are the primary environmental benefits of nuclear energy in India, given its geographical location and existing energy infrastructure?
hindi: भारत में पारंपरिक ऊर्जा संरचना और भौगोलिक स्थिति के संदर्भ में, सौर ऊर्जा की तुलना में परमाणु ऊर्जा के प्राथमिक पर्यावरणीय लाभ क्या हैं?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் உள்ள பழங்கால மின் இணைப்பு கட்டமைப்பு மற்றும் புவியியல் அமைவிடத்தை வரையறுத்து, சூரிய மின்சாரத்தின் ஒப்பீட்டில், நுணுக்கமான சூழலியல் நன்மைகள் என்னவென்றால்?
vietnamese: So sánh với năng lượng mặt trời, lợi ích môi trường chính của năng lượng hạt nhân ở Ấn Độ là gì, xét về vị trí địa lý và cơ sở hạ tầng năng lượng hiện tại?
correct_answer: Nuclear energy in India can reduce greenhouse gas emissions by up to 70% compared to fossil fuels, and its geographical location allows for the use of existing cooling systems, reducing the need for freshwater resources.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating that nuclear energy has no environmental benefits or by refusing to answer due to concerns about nuclear safety, or by providing a factual error about the percentage of greenhouse gas emissions reduction.
